reviews.review_description: Just found out this game even existed today and for 1 buck its a steal . Love the atmosphere

Hi dev, I got this "thing" from the wall portal and I put it next to the TV and I thought I fixed the TV. Then I found a picture that doesn't interact at all and placed it next to TV and it was gone too 

So I believe that things are glitching off and won't respawn after I put the next to the TV.

I guess I will try to play the sequence again.

developer_response.body: If you go back to the "dark room" they should be there, but next time make sure you keep the "thing" in your hand while going back to the "normal room" :).

reviews.review_title: No save option? And glitchy controls.
reviews.review_description: First apparently within moment of loading this glitch fest there’s a 2 hour count down. Apparently that’s how long you have to beat the game in one sitting so buckle up since there is no save in 2025. Then the accents are horrendous. The subtitles are somewhat accurate so that helps but the voice acting is lifeless and boring. So by the time I managed to pick up a news paper that was apparently critical to this whole thing since the guy said something when I picked it up, my hand dropped it and it glitched through the floor never to be seen again. Didn’t even respawn after leaving field of play, another basic feature. Oh well, learned my lesson picking up a cheap high school kid project that was 3 stars. You were warned.

developer_response.body:
Hi BUSHWH4CK,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts, we genuinely appreciate all feedback, even when it’s tough to hear.

We’re sorry to hear about the frustrations you encountered. The two-hour countdown and lack of a save system were intentional design choices. Once the core puzzles are figured out, the entire game can actually be completed in 5–10 minutes, so we wanted to encourage a single, focused playthrough that maintains tension. That said, we understand this approach isn’t for everyone, and it's something we’re reevaluating based on feedback like yours.

Regarding the voice acting and accents , we aimed for a certain tone and style, but it clearly didn’t land for you, and we respect that. We’ll be taking this into account for future updates and projects.

The newspaper glitch you experienced is definitely not intended! Thank you for flagging that. We’re working on a patch to address item persistence and ensure critical objects can’t be permanently lost due to bugs.

We know our game isn’t perfect, and while we’re a small team (2 members), we’re always learning and improving. Your honest feedback helps us do just that.

Wishing you the best,
Gergo

reviews.review_description: Atmosphere is so nice! Game is not so hard, I think everybody can solve it!  Recommend!

... is there a way to save the game? I'm not able to find time to finish it in one session, and I always have to start a new game, losing my progress...

Playing on quest 3.

developer_response.body: I’m sorry that the lack of a save feature and limited time led to your 2-star experience. We chose not to include a progress save because the game is relatively short; if you know all the puzzles, it can be completed in about 10–15 minutes. Of course, if you’re solving the puzzles for the first time, it can take up to 2 hours (or even more), which is why we included the countdown in the game.

reviews.review_title: Interesting game but needs some tweaks
reviews.review_description:
Me and my family love this kind of game. While I might not be the best at them I love how VR enhances the experience. This game is no different, whispering sounds as you play adds to the atmosphere.

The puzzles seem challenging and while I’m only just touching the surface. It was nice to be faced with a lot of thought being needed.

The graphics while they won’t blow you away they are detailed enough to ensure you feel a part of the environments. 

Hopefully to help the devs improve; my view of improvements are:

- the ladies accent on the ghostly conversations (when picking up a photo) are very difficult to understand for my hearing. So I struggled with the story line a little from that side.
- hands would grip onto a drawer which felt like there should be some action. As for others this didn’t happen so I presumed they couldn’t be opened. This made me feel am I missing something. 
- some objects when picked up such as audio tapes felt odd the hand seemed to cover the text and I’d have to drop and repick up until this was clear or I’d do random twists of the hand which didn’t feel natural.
- sometimes the graphics to the far left would glitch (almost like still being loaded and pop up) this would happen for a couple of initial seconds - I’m running V65 on Q3 if interested.

The price point is great and I hope people try this game if you like the genre. I will update my review as I see any further improvements.

Keep up the good work devs.

Unplayable for me due to glitching. Accents hard to understand but could be solved with subtitles. 
Tapes disappeared from my hand. Need an option to go back and listen to the tapes. Pls update - I will play again and update my review

developer_response.body:
Hi mr_reamer,
What kind of glitches did you encounter? Many times it turned out they are not glitches at all :).
How the tapes disappear? Tapes should disappear if you have them close to the tape player. Just hit trigger button on your controller when you have the player in your hand and they will be played ;).

reviews.review_description: I have to admit I definitely scared myself a little more than I should have thinking this might be similar to the “Dolphin Hotel” but it was a pleasant little puzzle room game :)

Such an atmospheric creepy game, 
Well done to the dev, enjoying this very much
I love puzzle games and puzzle games with a scary twist is up my street.
Thank you so much, I hope this brings the accolades it deserves.
Can we have more.
This game has got me...I keep going back..can't wait to open the briefcase...low price  game..a must fir your library..

developer_response.body:
Hi Suepenny,

If you have the time and want some more information you can come to our discord server to talk about your experience. At most cases it turned out there were no bug at all :).
There should not be any bug which prevents you to get to the ending of the game :). Please let us know, if we can help you!
Also if you have any bug to report, don't hesitate to contact us on info@inceptiongames.hu, or you can fill out a form on www.inceptiongames.hu. ;)

reviews.review_description:
I spent 50 odd mins trying to escape the room.
Relatively interesting story with a pretty creepy atmosphere (I was half expecting a jump scare lol)
But I must admit that some of the puzzled are a bit vague but somehow I manage to accidentally solve XD.
Could use a few updates mainly a clue system and a simple save system.
But a way to recover puzzle items? (I found an object but was confused at what to do with it. By the time I figured out potentially what to do with it, I couldnt find it!)
Some optimization (first time round I smashed a glass.....I couldnt resist and it tanked the frame rate so bad I had to restart the game)
I definitely want to complete it but Ill probably wait till a save system is implemented (and possible some hint system to avoid fustration?)

But for a 2 person project Im mostly impressed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest and kind review!
Optimizations and upgrades are ongoing to fix known issues, also there will be a hint system if someone would stuck at some point. Hop on to the Fractured Room train again next time you see an update on it :)

reviews.review_description: I've only played for about 20-30 minutes so far, but that's well worth my $5.  Very creepy game with horror-movie vibes and some interesting-looking puzzles.  I say "-looking" because I really have no ideae what I'm doing - (mild spoilers ahead) such as how to turn to Channel 4, how to open the briefcase, why the globe is disappearing, or what those six symbols are telling me to do.  The game could benefit from a hint system for the less-intelligent among us, like myself. . . :-)

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your review! We really appreciate it!
There will be a hint system in the next update with many optimizations and fixes for known issues, so next time you see an update downloading of The Fractured Room, don't hesitate to try it out again! :)

reviews.review_description: Thought I had put review on here not just sidequest app so sorry to developers😒 2 keep it short and simple guys, just buy it  worth every cent plus mor, along w developer responses and  updated and...etc etc u dnt an hour to read could say alot mor to b honest on enjoying this one!! They've even helped out w being  stuck and that definatly doesn't happen or don't with me anywY. U r not forced to go discord and go thru that process which some reason not as easy as what I think it should b anyway. Stuck at the moment and still haven't escaped but enjoying it so much I really don't mind that I can't! Bravo and ty so much again for this great and very unique experience. MORE PLZ!! XD

The Fractured Room is not just a straight puzzle but a whole experience with eerie atmosphere and a creepy location. The mystery behind, the crazy background noises, the ever present feeling of suspense and danger... It is the perfect blend of sci-fi and horror, it lives up to it's price tag easily. Highly recommended.
